caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a dark green t-shirt sits in a room filled with framed pictures and clothing racks. His shirt features the white text "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK". He is positioned behind a professional black microphone. In the background, a white mannequin wears a white long-sleeve shirt, and various articles of clothing hang on racks. Small logos are visible in the corners of the screen, including one that reads "BONE". As the sequence progresses, the man speaks and gestures with his hands. He starts by clasping his hands together, then raises his right hand to gesture while speaking, and finally extends his left hand outward with an open palm. His facial expression shifts from a focused look to a slight smile and a more animated speaking expression.
